nodes.name: Cache Get (Firestore)
nodes.notes: Configure Google service account credential with Firestore datastore.user role.

parameters.jsCode:
const flights = $input.first().json.data || [];
const input = $('Normalize Input').first().json;
return flights.slice(0, 20).map((f, i) => ({
  json: {
    id: `fl_${i}_${f.airline}_${f.flight_number}`,
    type: 'flight',
    carrier: f.airline,
    carrier_name: f.airline_name || f.airline,
    flight_number: f.flight_number,
    depart_at: f.depart_date,
    return_at: f.return_date,
    depart_time: f.depart_time || null,
    return_time: f.return_time || null,
    duration_outbound: f.duration_to || null,
    duration_return: f.duration_back || null,
    stops_outbound: f.transfers || 0,
    stops_return: f.return_transfers || 0,
    price_per_pax: f.value,
    price_total: f.value * input.pax,
    currency: 'EUR',
    affiliate_url: `https://www.aviasales.com/search/${input.from}${input.depart.replace(/-/g,'').slice(2,8)}${input.to}${input.return.replace(/-/g,'').slice(2,8)}${input.pax}?marker=${$env.TP_MARKER}`,
    source: 'travelpayouts'
  }
}));

nodes.name: Cache Set (Firestore)
nodes.notes: Fire-and-forget cache write; failure should not block response.
